big_problem: Bureau still hides tabs that have live API data — users hit dead nav or generic dumps instead of league intel.
epic: League L5 — Unhide scaffolded Bureau tabs
slice_title: Schedule tab unhidden with Octo renderer
acceptance_ref: ACCEPTANCE — Bureau tab renders bespoke UI
acceptance_commands: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const s=fs.readFileSync('apps/web/lib/bureau-features.ts','utf8');if(s.match(/HIDDEN_BUREAU_SLUGS = new Set\\(\\[\"/)process.exit(1);console.log('all bureau tabs visible');"
